creator: karlgrose@gmail.com
text:
After an upgrade to 9.0-BETA3 and subsequent building of net/openafs-1.6.0.20110814 from a current ports tree, the following errors are seen in dmesg following restart:

  link_elf: symbol ioctl undefined
  kldload: can't load libafs: Exec format error
  /etc/rc: WARNING: Unable to load kernel module libafs
  /etc/rc: WARNING: failed precmd routine for afsd

and afs sites are unavailable.

How-To-Repeat: Install or upgrade to PC-BSD 9.0-BETA3, install and configure openafs from ports
